sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move LEFT to go back, then try different approach
result = action(['LEFT'])
print("After LEFT:", result['state'], "done:", result.get('done'))

seg = current_frame.segmentation
r_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
g_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
print(f"R blocks: {len(r_blocks)}, G blocks: {len(g_blocks)}")
for n in r_blocks + g_blocks:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

# Check green structure
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  N: id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

# Try SPACE to rotate and see if level completes
result2 = action(['SPACE'])
print("\nAfter SPACE:", result2['state'], "done:", result2.get('done'), "level_completed:", result2.get('level_completed'))

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
r_blocks2 = [n for n in seg2['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
g_blocks2 = [n for n in seg2['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
print(f"R blocks: {len(r_blocks2)}, G blocks: {len(g_blocks2)}")
for n in r_blocks2 + g_blocks2:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
